title: LIP01 - Action
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-card variant="neutral-02-outlined">
    <gds-list dividers="">
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
        <gds-flex width="100%">
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Pending payments</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-button slot="trail" variant="neutral" size="small" rank="secondary">Review</button>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
        <gds-flex width="100%">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Incoming e-invoices</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-button slot="trail" variant="neutral" size="small" rank="secondary">Approve</button>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
        <gds-flex width="100%">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Account statement</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-button slot="trail" variant="neutral" size="small" rank="secondary">Download</button>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
        <gds-flex width="100%" justify-content="space-between" align-items="center">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Loan application</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-button slot="trail" variant="neutral"  size="small" rank="secondary">View</button>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    </gds-list>
  </gds-card>
</gds-div>
